notes: SHIP v1.14.300 - N-06 Rail Compass, STAGE 1 of 3 (flat U-map; owner 'ship stage 1'). Tapping a unit in the FLAT rack elevation now lights its rail SPAN BAND (both rail edges) + cage-nut HOLE TICKS, positioned by the shared eia_holesForSpan() from Stage 0 (one source of truth with the compass + the coming 3D). CSS-only + JS, rd-gated (legacy ?legacy=1 byte-identical). Pieces: (1) new #railSelOverlay div emitted inside .rack-canvas-grid ONLY under _fit (empty until tapped, so Master-elevation reuse + legacy are unaffected); carries data-totalu. (2) _railFlatSel state (keyed on the unit's U-span, NEVER idx per recon) + railSel_renderFlat() (band top/height via calc(var(--u-h)*n) matching the block coordinate space; hole ticks at calc(var(--u-h)*(totalU-u) + var(--u-h)*frac); cage-nut holes lit cyan via .is-cage, others dim) + railSel_bindFlat() (idempotent delegated click on #rackCanvas; No-Silent-Failures: console.warn + phantomToast on missing U-span/totalU, never silent-return). (3) railSel_bindFlat() called in the post-render rAF after rackFlat_applyFit. (4) CSS: .rail-sel-overlay/.rail-sel-band(-l/-r at left:28px/right:1px)/.rail-sel-hole(.is-cage=cyan)/.rack-canvas-block.is-rail-sel outline + blocks now cursor:pointer. Glass-band language on the band (cyan gradient+border+glow); state-driven (only while a unit is selected) so it does not violate the one-emitter doctrine (that is Command-scoped anyway). braces 11748->11765 balanced, CRLF preserved, three-stamp .299->.300. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): open a rack detail (FLAT view) -> tap a unit -> a cyan span band appears on both rail edges spanning that unit's U-height + hole-tick dots at the 3 holes/U (cage-nut holes brighter cyan); tap another unit -> selection moves; band/ticks track the fitted row height. Legacy (?legacy=1) shows NO band (byte-identical). STAGE 2 (3D emitters in rackElevation_render3D) = owner CLEARED the RACK SCENE LOCK (additive selection emitters only, via the hlBand precedent) -> queued next. Batch device-verify .286->.300 open.
